title: menu.updated v1
description: Emitted by merchant-catalog (V-T3) whenever a merchant's menu is created or edited. Keyed by aggregate:merchant_id so a merchant's catalog events stay ordered in one partition. Consumers: search (reindex) + cart (revalidate items). Carries the FULL current menu snapshot (no N+1 read-back, 02 §5). D30: additive-only within this topic.

version.description: monotonic menu version; lets consumers order/dedupe edits.

menu_etag.description: strong validator; correlates with the HTTP ETag.

merchant_name.description: OPTIONAL (D30 additive, V-T4): display name for the search/browse read model. Producers may omit it.

location.description: OPTIONAL (D30 additive, V-T4): store geo-point so the search indexer can place the merchant on its H3-res-5 shard. Producers may omit it (the store is then non-geo-queryable until a located update arrives).
